data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes user choices to reduce decision time, enhancing overall usability.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation bar limiting the number of options at top levels.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design large targets for buttons to improve click accuracy.
data.technical_spec: Increased button size in critical navigation areas for ease of access.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related items together to provide better user understanding.
data.technical_spec: Use of white space and grouping strategies in dashboard interfaces.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns experience with user expectations by borrowing familiar interactions.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to common web standards and patterns in interface design.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits content to what a user can process at once to avoid overload.
data.technical_spec: Dropdown menus and content collapsibles to manage on-screen data density.
